policy_hook: 2021 ARPA removed the ACA 400% FPL subsidy cliff; 2026 enhanced PTC expiration makes the cliff current again
identification_design: SIPP person-month local difference-in-discontinuities around 400% FPL
key_empirical_evidence: Uninsured -0.0277; person SE 0.0141; state SE 0.0151; lagged non-employer market_or_subsidy +0.0739
main_limitation: Annual-FPL mechanism weak; placebo thresholds not empty; full-sample employer source rises

policy_hook: Recent late adopters and current Medicaid expansion policy debate
identification_design: Late-expansion states vs never-expansion states around 100-138% FPL eligibility band
key_empirical_evidence: Medicaid +8.9 pp state t 3.04; uninsured -7.4 pp state t -4.80; 191926 person-months
main_limitation: Generic Medicaid expansion literature is saturated; uninsured placebo/pretrend mixed

idea: Medicare age-65 threshold / older-adult Marketplace bridge
policy_hook: Older pre-Medicare Marketplace affordability and proposals to lower Medicare eligibility age
identification_design: Age-65 local threshold and ARPA-era discontinuity change
key_empirical_evidence: Medicare +50.8 pp; uninsured -4.7 pp; direct purchase -5.7 pp at age 65
main_limitation: Standard Medicare age-65 RD is not novel; ARPA interaction mostly compositional

verdict: CONDITIONAL ARPA EXTENSION / NOT FIRST LEAD
policy_hook: ARPA 2021 special Marketplace subsidy rule for UI recipients
identification_design: DDD for UI recipients in 2021; event/timing variants
key_empirical_evidence: Excluding 2020 direct purchase +3.94 pp t 2.06; market/subsidy +3.81 pp t 1.99
main_limitation: UI receipt in 2021 confounded by pandemic labor market and UI policy shocks

policy_hook: ARPA zero-premium plans for many 100-150% FPL adults; 2026 enhanced PTC expiration
identification_design: Non-expansion 100-150 vs controls; DDD and local 150% models
key_empirical_evidence: Raw uninsured 39.8% to 33.4%; DDD uninsured -0.0085; DDD market/subsidy +0.0099
main_limitation: Strict models weak; local 150 uninsured moves wrong direction; controls contaminated

policy_hook: 2022 low-income Marketplace SEP and current debate over year-round enrollment
identification_design: HealthCare.gov vs SBM DDD among 138-150% FPL off-season months
key_empirical_evidence: Narrow no-Medicaid Marketplace flag +9.47 pp state t 1.93
main_limitation: Broad 100-150 no-Medicaid sensitivity does not replicate; SEP use unobserved

policy_hook: Premium burden should mediate the 400% FPL cliff removal
identification_design: Triple/quadruple interactions with high premium exposure and older age
main_limitation: Binary high-premium and older-age gradients do not support clean mechanism

policy_hook: 2023 rule fixed family affordability test for Marketplace PTC eligibility
identification_design: Family exposure proxy and premium-burden transition DDD
key_empirical_evidence: Closest cell has 74 actual 2022->2023 high-burden pairs; direct-market +0.0203 t 0.56; exchange/subsidy -0.0114 t -0.47
main_limitation: SIPP lacks employer offer and employee-only vs family premium eligibility variables

verdict: NO-GO FOR CURRENT SIPP MAIN PAPER
identification_design: Arkansas treated cell during 2018-2019 work-requirement period
key_empirical_evidence: About 979 person-months and 109 Medicaid months in key cell
recommended_use: Do not pursue with current SIPP

verdict: NO-GO FOR MAIN SIPP CAUSAL PAPER
main_limitation: SIPP support too thin for main causal design
recommended_use: Do not pursue as main paper

main_limitation: COBRA eligibility and take-up not observed cleanly

policy_hook: 2018 federal STLDI expansion and state restrictions
identification_design: Permissive vs restrictive state DDD among target adults
main_limitation: SIPP does not identify STLDI enrollment

verdict: DIRECTIONAL INSURANCE SIGNAL BUT NO CLEAN GO
policy_hook: State 1332 reinsurance programs affect individual-market premiums
key_empirical_evidence: Directional but not clean insurance signal
main_limitation: Needs better premium-reduction intensity; binary adoption insufficient
recommended_use: Discarded unless better external intensity added

verdict: TOPICAL BUT NOT CLEAN FROM CURRENT PACKAGE
policy_hook: Public charge rules and immigrant chilling effects
key_empirical_evidence: Not a sample-size no-go but DDD not clean
main_limitation: Needs raw-variable extraction and stronger immigrant exposure construction

key_empirical_evidence: Policy-hot but no clean health-insurance causal estimate
main_limitation: SIPP lacks insulin use and Part D exposure

verdict: NO-GO AS MAIN SIPP HEALTH-INSURANCE PAPER
policy_hook: Student loan repayment restart may affect household finances and coverage
main_limitation: True repayment exposure not cleanly observed

verdict: OUT OF CURRENT INSURANCE SCOPE / CONDITIONAL FOOD-SECURITY LEAD
policy_hook: SNAP EA termination affects food security

recommended_use: Do not displace ARPA400 in this goal
